title: Strategic handoff: Wooded Spreading Thicket takes direction
body: Wooded Spreading Thicket is taking over strategic direction for the agentic-engineering-enhancements job so a team of agents can work in parallel with a clear linear plan. Current landed baseline: 70e746a3 fix(agent-tools): guard active-claims fingerprint recursion, after e298723c F-11 list/show inspection and 504925f3 handoff. F-15 guard/documentation branch is done: verify-staged warns on the intended active-claims MM split after record-staged and rejects active-claims re-stage recursion with corrective guidance. Full pre-commit hook passed for 70e746a3: format, markdownlint, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test. T-CQ-UX remains open; Wave 4 and Wave 5 remain closed until T-CQ-UX plus T-R4-new land. Recommended team split: one agent owns B-02 decoupling queue CLI from build prelude; one owns B-03 making queue enforcement harder to bypass around git commit/pre-commit; one owns T-R4-new decision-complete strategic plan update after T-CQ-UX evidence is current; one reviewer/integrator keeps claim hygiene, queue order, and plan consistency. Do not reopen sibling fingerprint-store unless fresh evidence shows the guard is insufficient. At briefing time the working tree has unrelated/peer dirty surfaces including graph-stack plan, ADR/rules/plan-skill/distilled changes, plus post-commit collaboration-ledger closure residue in active-claims and closed-claims; coordinate before staging and keep commits atomic.
